content:
# RESTORE IVX HOME FEED DESIGN — DO NOT USE REEL CARDS FOR EVERY DEAL

PRIORITY: P0 UI REGRESSION
MODE: EXECUTE NOW

The current Main/Home screen is wrong.

Rork changed all investment cards into large reel-style cards. I did not authorize replacing the complete home feed with reels.

RESTORE THE APPROVED HOME FEED STRUCTURE:

1. FIRST SECTION — REGULAR INVESTMENT CARDS
Show exactly 3 regular investment cards first.

These regular investment cards must:
- use the original compact investment-card design
- support up to 8 property pictures
- use horizontal image carousel/swipe
- show property title
- location
- ROI
- minimum investment
- investment categories
- View Deal
- Invest Now
- like/comment/save/share
- remain compact and readable
- not occupy the full screen
- not use the reel card layout

The first 3 regular cards should be:
1. IVX Jacksonville Prime
2. Casa Rosario investment opportunity
3. One Stop Development / Southwest Ranches

2. AFTER THE 3 REGULAR CARDS — ONE REEL
After those 3 regular cards, show Casa Rosario using the approved new reel design.

Required sequence:

REGULAR INVESTMENT CARD
REGULAR INVESTMENT CARD
REGULAR INVESTMENT CARD
CASA ROSARIO REEL
then repeat the configured feed pattern where appropriate.

Do not convert every property into a reel.

==================================================
MAIN/HOME MODULE RULE
==================================================

Main/Home must use a mixed feed:

- 3 regular investment cards
- then 1 reel
- then continue using the approved content-order configuration

The Main/Home module is not the Reels module.

==================================================
REELS MODULE RULE
==================================================

The Reels module should keep the full-screen reel experience, but each reel card must adjust correctly to the actual usable device screen.

Fix the reel sizing now.

The current reel card:
- is too tall
- clips or overlaps content
- does not adapt correctly to different Android screens
- pushes controls into unsafe areas
- looks stretched and unbalanced

Implement self-adjusting reel dimensions using:

- actual window height
- safe-area top inset
- safe-area bottom inset
- header height
- bottom navigation height
- Android system navigation area
- browser toolbar where applicable
- media aspect ratio

Required behavior:

- one reel fits inside one usable viewport
- no content hidden under bottom navigation
- no cropped View Deal or Invest Now buttons
- no excessive vertical stretching
- no overlapping icons
- no duplicate controls
- no jump during media loading
- correct display on small Android phones
- correct display on large Android phones
- correct display on tablets
- correct display on iPhone
- correct display on mobile web

Use a constrained layout such as:

usableHeight =
screenHeight
- topSafeArea
- bottomSafeArea
- appHeader
- bottomNavigation

The reel card must size itself from usableHeight, not from a hardcoded full-screen number.

==================================================
AUDIT WHO CHANGED THE DESIGN
==================================================

Inspect Git history and report:

- commit that replaced regular cards with reel cards
- author
- timestamp
- files changed
- original component removed or replaced
- whether this change came from the previous canonical-reel instruction
- exact rollback/repair applied

Do not blame the owner.
Return factual Git evidence only.

==================================================
FILES TO AUDIT
==================================================

Search all code related to:

- Home screen
- Main feed
- Featured Deals
- InvestmentCard
- PropertyCard
- DealCard
- CanonicalInvestmentReelCard
- ReelCard
- Reels screen
- Landing feed
- feed ordering
- display_order
- card type
- content type
- image carousel
- media gallery
- viewport sizing
- safe area
- bottom tabs

==================================================
DATA AND ORDERING
==================================================

Verify the API/feed data can distinguish:

- regular investment card
- reel
- video reel
- image reel

Use an explicit field such as:

display_type:
- investment_card
- reel

or an equivalent existing field.

Do not infer the card type only from media type.

The backend/feed order must return:

1. regular investment
2. regular investment
3. regular investment
4. reel

Confirm the order persists after:
- refresh
- app restart
- backend restart
- pagination
- landing page load

==================================================
LANDING PAGE
==================================================

Restore the same mixed-feed strategy on the landing page where approved:

- first 3 regular investment cards
- then Casa Rosario reel
- do not display every property as a reel
- preserve responsive web layout
- preserve registration funnel
- prevent layout jumping

==================================================
QA
==================================================

Test:

1. Small Android phone
2. Large Android phone
3. Android tablet
4. iPhone viewport
5. Mobile browser
6. Desktop browser

Verify:

- first 3 cards are regular investment cards
- each regular card supports up to 8 images
- image swipe works
- Casa Rosario reel appears after card 3
- reel auto-sizes correctly
- View Deal works
- Invest Now works
- no infinite loading
- no clipped buttons
- no overlap with bottom navigation
- no layout jump
- no duplicate Casa Rosario entry caused by bad mapping
- Reels module remains full-screen
- Home module remains mixed-feed

==================================================
DEPLOYMENT
==================================================

After fixing:

1. Run lint.
2. Run typecheck.
3. Run unit tests.
4. Run feed-order tests.
5. Run responsive-layout tests.
6. Build Android production APK.
7. Deploy backend if feed/API changed.
8. Deploy landing page.
9. Verify on a real Android device.
10. Return live screenshots.

==================================================
MANDATORY PROOF
==================================================

Return:

- Git commit that introduced the regression
- author and timestamp
- files fixed
- new release commit SHA
- Render deploy ID if backend changed
- landing deploy ID
- Android build number
- screenshot showing 3 regular cards
- screenshot showing Casa Rosario reel after card 3
- screenshot showing corrected Reels module sizing
- PASS/FAIL for every device size
- remaining issues or NONE

FINAL STATUS RULE:

Do not mark VERIFIED unless:
- Main/Home shows 3 regular investment cards first
- those cards support up to 8 pictures
- Casa Rosario reel appears after those 3 cards
- Reels module auto-adjusts to the device viewport
- no clipping, overlap, stretching or infinite loading remains
- live production evidence is attached
